case_title: THE CITY TOW VS ST. THOMAS, CHARLES

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SIGNED STIPULATED ORDER TO SET-ASIDE OF JUDGMENT TO BE PICK-UP BY CHARLES ST. THOMAS. PER LEGAL ADVISOR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS RUN OUT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY TOW RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ST. THOMAS, CHARLES $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $36.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,536.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
IT IS HEREBY ORDERED: PER STIPULATION OF PARTIES, THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON AUGUST 2003 IN CASE #760983 IS SET ASIDE AND DISMISSED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY THE CITY TOW AS TO DEFENDANT ST. THOMAS, CHARLES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-26-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
CERT MAIL TO CHARLES ST. THOMAS RETURNED SIGNED.
STIPULATED SET-ASIDE OF JUDGMENT FILED-SENT TO COURT FOR ORDER.
